text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm passing by the station one day when I spot
Marvelous Sunday talking with a fortune teller.

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
Hmm! Ohoho! The path is clear... I have seen into
your future!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, what kind of marvelous things have you
gleaned?

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
From the heavens will fall the inescapable threat
of fangs and claws as sharp as blades! You must
escape before this calamity—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
In other words... something marvelous is on the
way! Ooh, might that be it over there?

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Don't leave before I'm done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intrigued by their exchange, I go running after
Marvelous Sunday.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Aha, this must be the spot!

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Raaaooow!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh dear! That was a close one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of nowhere, a cat came hurtling down toward
Marvelous Sunday, but she managed to catch it in
her arms.

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm so sorry! She jumped off the balcony all of a
sudden!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
No need to apologize! I'm just glad your kitty's
unharmed! ☆

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text:
She's a member of the family. Thank you so much
for saving her.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You two certainly do share a marvelous
bond! ★

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
That was the calamity I foretold. How interesting
that she evaded all harm entirely on her own...

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Wait, you're the fortune teller that gave me
a reading yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text:
You told me I was sure to seize true love, but my
crush turned me down the moment I shared my
feelings! What do I do now, you fraud?!

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text: The veil is parting, my eyes see all... What's this?! Dark misfortune looms in my future!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you told your crush you liked them? How
marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's so marvelous about it?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Why, the courage to confess your true feelings,
and the passionate fury of your love!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Your strong heart is marvelous! ☆ Oh, it's the
most marvelous of all marvelous things! ★

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text:
But if I got rejected, what does any of that
matter?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: You might have been rejected, but I'm sure you'll be able to find true true love someday! You're so marvelous that it's simply bound to happen! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Just keep your chin up and march on toward the
marvelous future that awaits you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text: The future that awaits me...

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you know what? I will keep moving forward, and I'll find an even better partner!

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm saved? In the future I saw, she was
absolutely livid with me, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
Could it be... that you've changed the weave of
fate, just as you did with that cat earlier?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yep! ☆ I can change the future into something
much more marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Let's take our first steps toward making
the world even more marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course! This is... marvelous! Simply
maaarvelous!
